name: ayfie Group AS
summary: ayfie Group AS, a search company, provides knowledge discovery products and search solutions in the Nordics, Europe, and the United States. Its products are based on artificial intelligence enhanced solutions built on proprietary linguistics, machine learning, smart search, and text analytics. The company offers search and text analytics solutions for legal, compliance, finance, healthcare, and media. Its platform includes technologies from the fields of big data, insight engines, linguistic analysis, and content analytics. The company also provides text analytics solutions for eDiscovery, finance, publishing, and compliance. Its products include Locator for Knowledge Management that helps customers turn their corporate data into a true knowledge resource; Inspector that helps lawyers and others involved in litigation and investigations to identify the data important for their cases; and Document Analyzer that reads collections of documents to extract key information. The company's products are used by various industries ranging from construction companies to professional soccer clubs; and messaging and feature development focuses on serving law firms and legal service providers, as well as legal departments in corporations. It also offers service desk and knowledge base services. The company is headquartered in Oslo, Norway.
